stemHtml: St. Elmo`s fire can be defined as...

options.a: the electric charge of the aircraft caused by air parcels over the wings and windscreen.
options.b: an electric discharge from the aircraft caused by static build-up on the airframe.
options.c: lightning from the top of a mature cumulonimbus cloud hitting the fuselage.
options.d: lightning in the horizontal plane in a cumulonimbus cloud hitting the wing tip.
